value.value:
Jjot helps you take online notes

Think of it as online sticky notes. They're simple, fast, and you can access them from any computer.

What can I do with Jjot?

Jot down meeting notes, todo lists, or web research
Share them — with just a few people, or with everyone
Print them — take your notes with you in your pocket

This is a note

You can type in it, drag it around, make links, or delete it. Give it a try.

 

To save your notes permanently, sign up for an account. It's free and takes only seconds.
